resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of a specific recurring schedule, but the linked use case only describes a recurring service every other Friday at 9am. This indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement of a weekly occurrence on Tuesdays at 2pm. The evidence does not provide any information or endpoints that confirm the existence of a Tuesday 2pm schedule, leading to the conclusion that the requirement is not covered.
gaps: Weekly recurring schedule every Tuesday at 2pm is not defined in the use case.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
